name: 奇幻衝突開場
description: 以九天玄女在天庭打麻將贏錢的荒誕場景開場，瞬間建立角色的強大與不羈，隨即被閻王偷襲貶下凡間，製造巨大落差感，觀眾既好奇她的來歷又想看她如何翻盤。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: You'd better have something better than my pure hand, big monotone, consecutive Kong self-drawn to win all the king of hell's money... lady of the nine heavens, don't blame me. The entire heavenly court and underworld jointly petitioned to send you on this tribulation.
